# SolTech

> Solar panel installation and maintenance in Dubai under the DEWA Shams Dubai programme. Homeowners and businesses replace grid electricity (0.38-0.46 AED/kWh) with self-generated solar at roughly 0.11 AED/kWh, cutting the DEWA bill for 25 years. All figures on the site are illustrative models; final numbers follow a free engineering assessment.

## Pages

- [Home](https://soltech.solutions/): Overview, live savings calculator, 25-year cost comparison, model scenarios, and FAQ.
- [Savings calculator](https://soltech.solutions/calculator.html): Villa/business calculator estimating system size (kWp), investment, payback, 25-year net savings and CO2 avoided from a monthly DEWA bill, with the published methodology.
- [Equipment we install](https://soltech.solutions/equipment.html): DEWA Eligible-Equipment-listed panel and inverter brands SolTech installs, selected on ROI, heat tolerance and warranty.
- [DEWA & Shams Dubai guide](https://soltech.solutions/dewa-guide.html): How Shams Dubai, net metering, eligible equipment and grid-tied systems work, plus tariffs and realistic timelines.
- [Case studies](https://soltech.solutions/case-studies.html): Illustrative before/after savings stories and a 25-year cost-of-ownership comparison.
- [Maintenance plans](https://soltech.solutions/maintenance.html): Post-connection O&M — fault monitoring is free for life on every install (catches faults, keeps the warranty record). Paid cleaning plans Care from AED 79/month and Complete from AED 159/month (villa); commercial from ~AED 35/kWp/year. Cleaning wins back roughly 2x its cost.

## Key sections

- [Savings calculator](https://soltech.solutions/#calc): Enter an average monthly DEWA bill to estimate price per kWh, yearly savings, and payback period.
- [25-year comparison](https://soltech.solutions/#compare): Cumulative cost of electricity, staying on DEWA versus going solar.
- [How it works](https://soltech.solutions/#how): Steps from first calculation to switch-on, typically 45-60 days for a villa.
- [Model scenarios](https://soltech.solutions/#models): Illustrative villa (12 kWp) and warehouse (300 kWp) examples.
- [FAQ](https://soltech.solutions/#faq): Selling the property, grid outages, timelines, warranties, and maintenance.

## What SolTech does

- Grid-tied solar installation designed and filed under DEWA's official Shams Dubai scheme.
- Installs only panels and inverters listed in DEWA's Eligible Equipment registry.
- In-house engineering: one accountable team owns the design, the DEWA filing, the install, and the warranty.
- Published, conservative calculation methodology.

## Contact

- WhatsApp and email (hello@soltech.solutions) are available on the site.
- Service area: Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Hours: Sunday to Friday, 09:00-18:00 GST.

## Notes

- All example figures are illustrative models, not quotes.
- A grid-tied system without battery storage does not provide backup power during a grid outage.
